channel.title: The Richest Man In Babylon on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in The Richest Man In Babylon on My Blog

item.title: Ideas
item.description:
Ideas worth remembering from the Book.

Chapter-1 :- The Richest man of Babylon.

  • The learning are of two kinds: The one kind of the things we learned and know, and other being the training we taught of things we don’t knew.
  • “A part of all i earned is mine to keep” - The money lender.
  • Save 1/10 of your money, if you earn.

Chapter-2 :- Seven curses for a lean purse.

item.title: Intro
item.description:
Tags: #book

“The richest man of babylon” is written by Georage S. Classon

So, This is books is about Babylon an ancient city originated at Mesopotamia. And how this city becomes the weathiest city in the world.

Glossary

  1. Euphrates -> River in Babylon.
  2. Sumerites -> Inhabitants of Babylon.
  3. Tigris -> River in Babylon.
  4. Herodotus -> Greek traveler and Historian.
  5. Bansir -> Chariot builder.
  6. Kobbi -> Best friend with bansir, and a musician
  7. Arkad -> Richest man in Babylon, Old friends of Kobbi and Bansir.
